---
title: "Tutorials"
description: "Task-oriented guides for working with neuroim objects."
sidebar: tutorials
---

These tutorials are the Quarto landing area for Python versions of the `neuroim2` vignettes. The first guide establishes the core mental model; the remaining R vignettes can be ported here incrementally.

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .h-100 .p-3}
### Core objects

Create spatial metadata, volumes, vectors, ROIs, and simple summaries.

[Open tutorial](core-objects.qmd)
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .h-100 .p-3}
### Migration path

The R sibling package currently has vignettes for volumes, vectors, resampling, smoothing, coordinate systems, ROIs, and pipelines. Port those into this section as executable Python `.qmd` files.
:::
:::

:::
